domainObjects.title: Executive Signal — September customer commitment risk rising across CPP, CPS, and LCM programs
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Executive operating review recorded multi-program September commitment risk requiring cross-functional recovery plan.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: At-risk customer commitments total more than $1.8M across critical September shipments.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Open Golden Story investigation and validate shortage, supplier, engineering, quality, manufacturing, logistics, service, finance, recommendation, and decision evidence.

domainObjects.title: Customer Commitment — Horizon LNG CPP-1000 September site-ready delivery
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Customer commitment record ties Horizon LNG September field installation date to CPP-1000 demand DMD-NR-GOU-CPP-HORIZON-01.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: Missed delivery risks outage-window loss, premium freight, and executive escalation.
domainObjects.next_action_summary: Prioritize CPP-1000 casting, ECO, machining, quality disposition, FAT, and shipment recovery.

domainObjects.title: Supplier Advisory SA-NR-2026-117 — Apex Foundry CPP casting shipment slips five days
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Apex Foundry Group notified NorthRiver that CPP-1000 casting shipment moves from 2026-07-28 to 2026-08-02 after furnace maintenance overrun.

domainObjects.title: ECO-NR-GOU-099 — CPP-1000 impeller clearance tolerance update
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Engineering released CPP-1000 impeller clearance update to allow contained rework on affected casting lot.

domainObjects.title: WO-NR-GOU-2101 — CPP-1000 Pueblo recovery machining
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Pueblo recovery machining work order requires partial receipt, ECO release, and MRB disposition before full release.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: Critical path for Horizon LNG CPP-1000 commitment.

domainObjects.title: NCR-NR-GOU-301 — CPP-1000 casting dimensional nonconformance
domainObjects.evidence_summary: NCR records dimensional nonconformance on one received CPP-1000 casting set; MRB must decide rework versus replacement.

domainObjects.title: MRB-NR-GOU-117 — Use-as-is with engineering-approved rework traveler
domainObjects.evidence_summary: MRB approved controlled rework against ECO-NR-GOU-099 for the quarantined CPP-1000 casting set.

domainObjects.title: Shipment SHP-NR-GOU-6101 — Horizon LNG CPP-1000 premium freight reservation
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Premium freight reservation protects Horizon LNG outage-window delivery if CPP machining recovery finishes by 2026-08-20.

domainObjects.title: Revenue Exposure — Horizon, Catalyst, and Atlas September commitments
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Finance exposure rollup ties demand values, premium freight, penalty exposure, and margin erosion to the September recovery plan.
domainObjects.business_impact_summary: At-risk revenue plus avoidable expedite and penalty exposure creates executive-level prioritization signal.

domainObjects.title: Service RMA-NR-GOU-014 — Helios CPP-1000 startup vibration evidence
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Service case provides field evidence that CPP vibration issue may be related to the same impeller tolerance family as ECO-NR-GOU-099.

domainObjects.title: Recommendation Context — Protect Horizon CPP-1000 through recovery machining and premium freight
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Scenario context links shortage recommendation evidence to supplier delay, ECO, NCR, MRB, machining bottleneck, and shipment recovery actions.

domainObjects.title: Executive Briefing Source — Week 31 commitment protection recovery plan
domainObjects.evidence_summary: Briefing source collects customer, supplier, quality, manufacturing, logistics, service, finance, recommendation, and decision evidence for executive review.
